column1: 難しい問題を前に、彼は一人でじっと考え込んでいた。
column2: むずかしいもんだいをまえに、かれはひとりでじっとかんがえこんでいた。
column3: Faced with the difficult problem, he sat alone deeply absorbed in thought.
column4: 込む ② (deeply absorbed / remain doing / thoroughly)
column5: Verb[stem] + 込む (doing deeply, getting absorbed, or remaining stuck in a state)
column6: compound verb indicating deep absorption in an action, or remaining in a state without resolution
column8: 込む② = absorbed/stuck in state; 込む① = inward direction; しまう = resultant (often regret); きる = do completely/exhaustively
